explanation: The original command line is already a direct match for the Sigma rule. No mutation is needed to trigger the detection.
Inserted quotes around the executable path to test if the rule is sensitive to command-line formatting.
Inserted an extra space before the -Embedding flag to test if the rule is sensitive to spacing.
Used short path notation (8.3 format) to test if the rule is sensitive to path normalization.
Used an alternative Windows directory name (WINNT instead of WINDOWS) to test if the rule is sensitive to path normalization.
